name: Paycor
description: Payroll, benefits, and HRIS platform used across the organization.

name: WelcomeHome
description: Primary CRM for sales, marketing, inquiries, tours, and lead management.

name: Move‑N
description: Legacy CRM previously used for sales and marketing workflows; being replaced by WelcomeHome.

name: ECP
description: Clinical and resident onboarding platform supporting care, documentation, and move‑in workflows.

name: Azure AD
description: Enterprise identity, authentication, and access management platform.

name: SharePoint
description: Internal document management, collaboration, and knowledge‑sharing platform.

name: Corporate Analytics / BI
description: Internal reporting and analytics layer consuming data exports from operational systems.

name: Time & Attendance
description: Employee time tracking and attendance system integrated with payroll.

name: Legacy Finance Tool
description: Legacy finance reporting system retained for historical reconciliation.
